sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try a small batch of actions and check for completion
# Try clicking red blocks: top, middle, bottom (each once)
for row, col in [(17, 20), (26, 14), (35, 14)]:
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': row, 'col': col}])
    print(f"After ({row},{col}): done={last_action_result.get('done')}, level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}, game_over={last_action_result.get('game_over')}")
    if last_action_result.get('done') or last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
